### Incomplete Checklist

The first 5 items in the **Checklist** section must all be checked before this PR can be accepted. These items confirm that you have read and followed the Django contribution guidelines.

**What to do:**

Review each item below and change `[ ]` to `[x]` once you have completed it:

1. `[x]` This PR follows the [contribution guidelines](https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/stable/internals/contributing/writing-code/submitting-patches/).
2. `[x]` This PR **does not** disclose a security vulnerability (see [vulnerability reporting](https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/stable/internals/security/)).
3. `[x]` This PR targets the `main` branch.
4. `[x]` The commit message is written in past tense, mentions the ticket number, and ends with a period.
5. `[x]` I have checked the "Has patch" ticket flag in the Trac system.

The remaining checklist items (tests, docs, screenshots) are optional but strongly encouraged where applicable.

If you are unsure about any of these requirements, please read the [Django contribution guide](https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/stable/internals/contributing/writing-code/submitting-patches/) before proceeding.
